name: Weetabix Fruit Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Weetabix into fine crumbs.
2. Add sugar, fruit, and flour to the crushed Weetabix.
3. Add milk and mix well until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased, lined loaf tin.
5. Bake at Gas Mark 4 / 350°F for 60 to 70 minutes.
6. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the tin.
7. Once completely cooled, store in an airtight container.
